exampleTraditional: 他竟然考了滿分！
examplePinyin: Tā jìngrán kǎo le mǎnfēn!

english: to hold (an event); to take place

exampleTraditional: 他明天將離開這座城市。
examplePinyin: Tā míngtiān jiāng líkāi zhè zuò chéngshì.

exampleTraditional: 水果有很多種，例如蘋果、橙子和香蕉。

english: to contact; to get in touch; connection

exampleTraditional: 我想更好地了解中國文化。
examplePinyin: Wǒ xiǎng gèng hǎo de liǎojiě Zhōngguó wénhuà.

exampleTraditional: 她打算去英國留學兩年。
examplePinyin: Tā dǎsuàn qù Yīngguó liú xué liǎng nián.
exampleEnglish: She plans to study abroad in the UK for two years.

exampleTraditional: 他每年都會去不同的城市旅遊。
examplePinyin: Tā měi nián dōu huì qù bùtóng de chéngshì lǚyóu.

exampleSimplified: 顾客对服务表示满意。
exampleTraditional: 顧客對服務表示滿意。
examplePinyin: Gùkè duì fúwù biǎoshì mǎnyì.
exampleEnglish: The customers expressed satisfaction with the service.

exampleSimplified: 他的进步非常明显。
exampleTraditional: 他的進步非常明顯。

exampleEnglish: His progress is very obvious.

exampleSimplified: 你来这里的目的是什么？
exampleTraditional: 你來這裡的目的是什麼？

exampleEnglish: What is your purpose in coming here?

english: could it be that; is it possible that
exampleSimplified: 难道你不知道这件事吗？
exampleTraditional: 難道你不知道這件事嗎？
examplePinyin: Nándào nǐ bù zhīdào zhè jiàn shì ma?
exampleEnglish: Could it be that you don't know about this?

exampleTraditional: 只要努力，就一定能成功。
examplePinyin: Zhǐyào nǔlì, jiù yīdìng néng chénggōng.
exampleEnglish: As long as you work hard, you will surely succeed.

english: to queue up; to stand in line
exampleSimplified: 大家请排队，不要插队。
exampleTraditional: 大家請排隊，不要插隊。
examplePinyin: Dàjiā qǐng páiduì, bùyào chāduì.
exampleEnglish: Everyone please queue up; don't cut in line.

exampleSimplified: 她的皮肤很好，很光滑。
exampleTraditional: 她的皮膚很好，很光滑。

exampleEnglish: Her skin is very good and smooth.

exampleSimplified: 他平时不太爱说话。
exampleTraditional: 他平時不太愛說話。
examplePinyin: Tā píngshí bù tài ài shuōhuà.
exampleEnglish: He doesn't usually talk much.

english: actually; in fact; as a matter of fact
exampleSimplified: 这道题其实并不难。
exampleTraditional: 這道題其實並不難。
examplePinyin: Zhè dào tí qíshí bìng bù nán.
exampleEnglish: This question is actually not difficult.

exampleTraditional: 過年的時候，我們會拜訪親戚。
examplePinyin: Guò nián de shíhou, wǒmen huì bàifǎng qīnqi.
exampleEnglish: During the Chinese New Year, we visit relatives.

english: to ask for leave; to take time off
exampleSimplified: 他生病了，向公司请了三天假。
exampleTraditional: 他生病了，向公司請了三天假。
examplePinyin: Tā shēngbìng le, xiàng gōngsī qǐng le sān tiān jià.
exampleEnglish: He got sick and took three days off from work.

exampleSimplified: 假期里他的心情很轻松。
exampleTraditional: 假期裡他的心情很輕鬆。
examplePinyin: Jiàqī lǐ tā de xīnqíng hěn qīngsōng.
exampleEnglish: During the holiday, he felt very relaxed.

exampleSimplified: 由于天气原因，比赛被取消了。
exampleTraditional: 由於天氣原因，比賽被取消了。

exampleTraditional: 請把全部的文件發給我。

exampleEnglish: Please send me all the documents.

exampleSimplified: 她非常热情，总是帮助别人。
exampleTraditional: 她非常熱情，總是幫助別人。

exampleEnglish: She is very enthusiastic and always helps others.

exampleSimplified: 她工作非常认真，从不马虎。
exampleTraditional: 她工作非常認真，從不馬虎。
examplePinyin: Tā gōngzuò fēicháng rènzhēn, cóng bù mǎhu.
exampleEnglish: She is very serious about her work and never careless.

english: to take a walk; to stroll
exampleSimplified: 饭后散步有益于健康。
exampleTraditional: 飯後散步有益於健康。
examplePinyin: Fàn hòu sàn bù yǒuyì yú jiànkāng.
exampleEnglish: Taking a walk after meals is good for your health.

exampleSimplified: 年轻人应该为社会作出贡献。
exampleTraditional: 年輕人應該為社會作出貢獻。

exampleSimplified: 他申请了一个奖学金。
exampleTraditional: 他申請了一個獎學金。
examplePinyin: Tā shēnqǐng le yī gè jiǎngxuéjīn.
exampleEnglish: He applied for a scholarship.

exampleSimplified: 他的生活很充实，工作和娱乐都有。
exampleTraditional: 他的生活很充實，工作和娛樂都有。
examplePinyin: Tā de shēnghuó hěn chōngshí, gōngzuò hé yúlè dōu yǒu.
exampleEnglish: His life is very fulfilling, with both work and entertainment.

exampleSimplified: 买这个套餐可以省不少钱。
exampleTraditional: 買這個套餐可以省不少錢。
examplePinyin: Mǎi zhège tàocān kěyǐ shěng bùshǎo qián.
exampleEnglish: Buying this combo can save a lot of money.

english: to make; to cause; to use
exampleSimplified: 这种药使他的病情好转了。
exampleTraditional: 這種藥使他的病情好轉了。
examplePinyin: Zhè zhǒng yào shǐ tā de bìngqíng hǎozhuǎn le.
exampleEnglish: This medicine made his condition improve.

exampleSimplified: 她梦想有一天能环游世界。
exampleTraditional: 她夢想有一天能環遊世界。
examplePinyin: Tā mèngxiǎng yǒu yītiān néng huányóu shìjiè.

exampleTraditional: 希望你的考試一切順利。

exampleSimplified: 你随便点，都可以。
exampleTraditional: 你隨便點，都可以。

exampleTraditional: 他非常喜歡體育運動，每週都去健身房。

exampleEnglish: He loves sports and goes to the gym every week.

exampleSimplified: 在这样的条件下，工作很困难。
exampleTraditional: 在這樣的條件下，工作很困難。
examplePinyin: Zài zhèyàng de tiáojiàn xià, gōngzuò hěn kùnnan.

english: to pass; through; by means of

exampleTraditional: 他通過了駕照考試。

english: to push; to promote; to postpone

exampleTraditional: 請把門推開，不要拉。

exampleTraditional: 他按時完成了所有的任務。
examplePinyin: Tā ànshí wánchéng le suǒyǒu de rènwu.

exampleTraditional: 這只是一場誤會，他並沒有惡意。

exampleTraditional: 她在大學中文系學習。

exampleTraditional: 你一定能通過考試的！

exampleTraditional: 她一直都很用功，成績總是名列前茅。

english: to praise; to commend; to extol
exampleSimplified: 老师赞扬了她认真努力的学习态度。
exampleTraditional: 老師讚揚了她認真努力的學習態度。
examplePinyin: Lǎoshī zànyáng le tā rènzhēn nǔlì de xuéxí tàidu.
exampleEnglish: The teacher praised her serious and hardworking attitude toward studying.

english: to strive for; to fight for; to try to win
exampleSimplified: 我们要争取在年底前完成这个项目。
exampleTraditional: 我們要爭取在年底前完成這個項目。
examplePinyin: Wǒmen yào zhēngqǔ zài nián dǐ qián wánchéng zhège xiàngmù.
exampleEnglish: We need to strive to complete this project before the end of the year.

exampleSimplified: 他们为了这个问题争论了很久。
exampleTraditional: 他們為了這個問題爭論了很久。
examplePinyin: Tāmen wèile zhège wèntí zhēnglùn le hěn jiǔ.
exampleEnglish: They argued about this issue for a long time.

exampleSimplified: 他的书桌总是摆放得非常整齐。
exampleTraditional: 他的書桌總是擺放得非常整齊。
examplePinyin: Tā de shūzhuō zǒngshì bǎifàng de fēicháng zhěngqí.
exampleEnglish: His desk is always arranged very neatly.

english: (measure word for long, thin objects); branch; to support
exampleSimplified: 她买了一支漂亮的钢笔。
exampleTraditional: 她買了一支漂亮的鋼筆。
examplePinyin: Tā mǎi le yī zhī piàoliang de gāngbǐ.
exampleEnglish: She bought a beautiful pen.

english: to be worth; to deserve; worthwhile
exampleSimplified: 努力学习是值得的，会有好的回报。
exampleTraditional: 努力學習是值得的，會有好的回報。
examplePinyin: Nǔlì xuéxí shì zhídé de, huì yǒu hǎo de huíbào.
exampleEnglish: Studying hard is worthwhile; it will bring good rewards.

english: to point; to refer to; finger
exampleSimplified: 他指着地图，告诉我们正确的路线。
exampleTraditional: 他指著地圖，告訴我們正確的路線。
examplePinyin: Tā zhǐzhe dìtú, gàosu wǒmen zhèngquè de lùxiàn.
exampleEnglish: He pointed at the map and told us the correct route.

exampleSimplified: 他从小就有志气，想成为一名科学家。
exampleTraditional: 他從小就有志氣，想成為一名科學家。
examplePinyin: Tā cóng xiǎo jiù yǒu zhìqì, xiǎng chéngwéi yī míng kēxuéjiā.
exampleEnglish: He has had ambitions since childhood, wanting to become a scientist.

exampleSimplified: 他的病情逐渐好转。
exampleTraditional: 他的病情逐漸好轉。
examplePinyin: Tā de bìngqíng zhújiàn hǎozhuǎn.
exampleEnglish: His condition is gradually improving.

english: on one's own initiative; active; proactive
exampleSimplified: 他非常主动，总是第一个提出问题。
exampleTraditional: 他非常主動，總是第一個提出問題。
examplePinyin: Tā fēicháng zhǔdòng, zǒngshì dì yī gè tíchū wèntí.
exampleEnglish: He is very proactive, always the first to raise questions.

english: to grasp; to catch; to seize
exampleSimplified: 你要抓住这次难得的机会。
exampleTraditional: 你要抓住這次難得的機會。
examplePinyin: Nǐ yào zhuāzhù zhè cì nándé de jīhuì.
exampleEnglish: You must seize this rare opportunity.

exampleSimplified: 他的态度发生了很大的转变。
exampleTraditional: 他的態度發生了很大的轉變。
examplePinyin: Tā de tàidu fāshēng le hěn dà de zhuǎnbiàn.
exampleEnglish: His attitude has undergone a great transformation.

english: since; ever since; from the time of
exampleSimplified: 自从搬来这里，他的生活发生了很大变化。
exampleTraditional: 自從搬來這裡，他的生活發生了很大變化。
examplePinyin: Zìcóng bān lái zhèlǐ, tā de shēnghuó fāshēng le hěn dà biànhuà.
exampleEnglish: Ever since he moved here, his life has changed greatly.

exampleSimplified: 这个门可以自动开关。
exampleTraditional: 這個門可以自動開關。
examplePinyin: Zhège mén kěyǐ zìdòng kāiguān.
exampleEnglish: This door can open and close automatically.

exampleSimplified: 学生应该自觉遵守学校的规定。
exampleTraditional: 學生應該自覺遵守學校的規定。
examplePinyin: Xuésheng yīnggāi zìjué zūnshǒu xuéxiào de guīdìng.
exampleEnglish: Students should consciously abide by school rules.

exampleSimplified: 他非常尊敬自己的老师。
exampleTraditional: 他非常尊敬自己的老師。
examplePinyin: Tā fēicháng zūnjìng zìjǐ de lǎoshī.
exampleEnglish: He has great respect for his teachers.

exampleSimplified: 他本来打算早点回来，但堵车了。
exampleTraditional: 他本來打算早點回來，但堵車了。
examplePinyin: Tā běnlái dǎsuàn zǎo diǎn huílái, dàn dǔchē le.
exampleEnglish: He originally planned to come back early, but got stuck in traffic.

exampleSimplified: 朋友之间要彼此理解，互相支持。
exampleTraditional: 朋友之間要彼此理解，互相支持。
examplePinyin: Péngyou zhījiān yào bǐcǐ lǐjiě, hùxiāng zhīchí.
exampleEnglish: Friends should understand each other and support one another.

exampleSimplified: 学生们就这个话题展开了激烈的辩论。
exampleTraditional: 學生們就這個話題展開了激烈的辯論。
examplePinyin: Xuéshengmen jiù zhège huàtí zhǎnkāi le jīliè de biànlùn.
exampleEnglish: Students engaged in a fierce debate on this topic.

exampleSimplified: 他在三十岁时获得了博士学位。
exampleTraditional: 他在三十歲時獲得了博士學位。
examplePinyin: Tā zài sānshí suì shí huòdé le bóshì xuéwèi.
exampleEnglish: He obtained his doctorate at the age of thirty.

exampleSimplified: 公司制定了一个新的市场策略。
exampleTraditional: 公司制定了一個新的市場策略。
examplePinyin: Gōngsī zhìdìng le yī gè xīn de shìchǎng cèlüè.
exampleEnglish: The company formulated a new market strategy.

exampleSimplified: 他们两人之间的水平差距很大。
exampleTraditional: 他們兩人之間的水平差距很大。
examplePinyin: Tāmen liǎng rén zhījiān de shuǐpíng chājù hěn dà.
exampleEnglish: The gap in level between the two of them is very large.

english: to admit; to acknowledge; to recognize
exampleSimplified: 他承认了自己犯了错误。
exampleTraditional: 他承認了自己犯了錯誤。
examplePinyin: Tā chéngrèn le zìjǐ fàn le cuòwù.
exampleEnglish: He admitted that he had made a mistake.

exampleSimplified: 电脑上储存了大量的工作文件。
exampleTraditional: 電腦上儲存了大量的工作文件。
examplePinyin: Diànnǎo shàng chǔcún le dàliàng de gōngzuò wénjiàn.
exampleEnglish: A large amount of work documents are stored on the computer.

exampleSimplified: 她创造了一种全新的绘画风格。
exampleTraditional: 她創造了一種全新的繪畫風格。
examplePinyin: Tā chuàngzào le yī zhǒng quánxīn de huìhuà fēnggé.
exampleEnglish: She created a completely new painting style.

exampleSimplified: 他喜欢读书，此外还喜欢旅行。
exampleTraditional: 他喜歡讀書，此外還喜歡旅行。
examplePinyin: Tā xǐhuān dúshū, cǐwài hái xǐhuān lǚxíng.
exampleEnglish: He likes reading; besides that, he also likes traveling.

english: to promote; to advance; to facilitate
exampleSimplified: 交流可以促进两国之间的友谊。
exampleTraditional: 交流可以促進兩國之間的友誼。
examplePinyin: Jiāoliú kěyǐ cùjìn liǎng guó zhījiān de yǒuyì.
exampleEnglish: Communication can promote friendship between the two countries.

exampleSimplified: 她穿衣服很大方，总是给人好印象。
exampleTraditional: 她穿衣服很大方，總是給人好印象。
examplePinyin: Tā chuān yīfu hěn dàfāng, zǒngshì gěi rén hǎo yìnxiàng.
exampleEnglish: She dresses elegantly and always makes a good impression.

exampleSimplified: 多亏了你的帮助，我才顺利完成了任务。
exampleTraditional: 多虧了你的幫助，我才順利完成了任務。
examplePinyin: Duōkuī le nǐ de bāngzhù, wǒ cái shùnlì wánchéng le rènwu.
exampleEnglish: Thanks to your help, I was able to complete the task smoothly.

exampleSimplified: 这些多余的废话就不用说了。
exampleTraditional: 這些多餘的廢話就不用說了。
examplePinyin: Zhèxiē duōyú de fèihuà jiù bùyòng shuō le.
exampleEnglish: There's no need to say all these unnecessary words.

exampleSimplified: 把两组数据进行对比，找出差异。
exampleTraditional: 把兩組數據進行對比，找出差異。
examplePinyin: Bǎ liǎng zǔ shùjù jìnxíng duìbǐ, zhǎo chū chāyì.
exampleEnglish: Compare the two groups of data to find the differences.

exampleSimplified: 她还没有找到合适的对象。
exampleTraditional: 她還沒有找到合適的對象。
examplePinyin: Tā hái méiyǒu zhǎodào héshì de duìxiàng.
exampleEnglish: She hasn't found a suitable partner yet.

english: to turn over; to flip; to cross
exampleSimplified: 他翻了翻书，找到了那篇文章。
exampleTraditional: 他翻了翻書，找到了那篇文章。
examplePinyin: Tā fān le fān shū, zhǎodào le nà piān wénzhāng.
exampleEnglish: He flipped through the book and found that article.

exampleSimplified: 比赛的规则必须对所有人公平。
exampleTraditional: 比賽的規則必須對所有人公平。
examplePinyin: Bǐsài de guīzé bìxū duì suǒyǒu rén gōngpíng.
exampleEnglish: The rules of the competition must be fair to everyone.

exampleSimplified: 孩子们对什么都很好奇，喜欢问问题。
exampleTraditional: 孩子們對什麼都很好奇，喜歡問問題。
examplePinyin: Háizimen duì shénme dōu hěn hàoqí, xǐhuān wèn wèntí.
exampleEnglish: Children are curious about everything and like to ask questions.

exampleSimplified: 好在我带了雨伞，不然会淋湿的。
exampleTraditional: 好在我帶了雨傘，不然會淋濕的。
examplePinyin: Hǎozài wǒ dài le yǔsǎn, bùrán huì lín shī de.
exampleEnglish: Fortunately I brought an umbrella, otherwise I would have gotten wet.

exampleSimplified: 他们家庭关系非常和谐，充满了爱。
exampleTraditional: 他們家庭關係非常和諧，充滿了愛。
examplePinyin: Tāmen jiātíng guānxi fēicháng héxié, chōngmǎn le ài.
exampleEnglish: Their family relationship is very harmonious and full of love.

exampleSimplified: 发生了紧急情况，请立刻通知领导。
exampleTraditional: 發生了緊急情況，請立刻通知領導。
examplePinyin: Fāshēng le jǐnjí qíngkuàng, qǐng lìkè tōngzhī lǐngdǎo.
exampleEnglish: An emergency has occurred; please immediately notify the leadership.

english: to save; to economize; to cut down on
exampleSimplified: 使用公共交通可以节省不少开支。
exampleTraditional: 使用公共交通可以節省不少開支。
examplePinyin: Shǐyòng gōnggòng jiāotōng kěyǐ jiéshěng bùshǎo kāizhī.
exampleEnglish: Using public transportation can save a lot of expenses.

english: to come into contact with; to touch; contact
exampleSimplified: 他从小就接触音乐，长大后成了音乐家。
exampleTraditional: 他從小就接觸音樂，長大後成了音樂家。
examplePinyin: Tā cóng xiǎo jiù jiēchù yīnyuè, zhǎngdà hòu chéng le yīnyuèjiā.
exampleEnglish: He was exposed to music from a young age and became a musician when he grew up.

english: it can be seen; evidently; obviously
exampleSimplified: 他连最基本的问题都不会，可见平时没好好学习。
exampleTraditional: 他連最基本的問題都不會，可見平時沒好好學習。
examplePinyin: Tā lián zuì jīběn de wèntí dōu bù huì, kějiàn píngshí méi hǎohǎo xuéxí.
exampleEnglish: He can't even answer the most basic questions, which shows he hasn't studied hard.

exampleSimplified: 这条路很宽，可以同时通过两辆车。
exampleTraditional: 這條路很寬，可以同時通過兩輛車。
examplePinyin: Zhè tiáo lù hěn kuān, kěyǐ tóngshí tōngguò liǎng liàng chē.
exampleEnglish: This road is very wide; two cars can pass through at the same time.

exampleSimplified: 这条新闻的来源不明，请谨慎对待。
exampleTraditional: 這條新聞的來源不明，請謹慎對待。
examplePinyin: Zhè tiáo xīnwén de láiyuán bù míng, qǐng jǐnshèn duìdài.
exampleEnglish: The source of this news is unknown; please treat it with caution.

english: to use; to make use of; to take advantage of
exampleSimplified: 他利用空闲时间学习新技能。
exampleTraditional: 他利用空閒時間學習新技能。
examplePinyin: Tā lìyòng kòngxián shíjiān xuéxí xīn jìnéng.
exampleEnglish: He makes use of his free time to learn new skills.

exampleSimplified: 他对现在的生活感到非常满足。
exampleTraditional: 他對現在的生活感到非常滿足。
examplePinyin: Tā duì xiànzài de shēnghuó gǎndào fēicháng mǎnzú.
exampleEnglish: He feels very satisfied with his current life.

english: to face; to confront; to deal with
exampleSimplified: 我们要勇敢地面对生活中的挑战。
exampleTraditional: 我們要勇敢地面對生活中的挑戰。
examplePinyin: Wǒmen yào yǒnggǎn de miànduì shēnghuó zhōng de tiǎozhàn.
exampleEnglish: We must bravely face the challenges in life.

exampleSimplified: 每个人都是自己命运的主人。
exampleTraditional: 每個人都是自己命運的主人。
examplePinyin: Měi gè rén dōu shì zìjǐ mìngyùn de zhǔrén.
exampleEnglish: Everyone is the master of their own destiny.

exampleSimplified: 骑摩托车时必须戴头盔。
exampleTraditional: 騎摩托車時必須戴頭盔。
examplePinyin: Qí mótuōchē shí bìxū dài tóukuī.
exampleEnglish: You must wear a helmet when riding a motorcycle.

exampleSimplified: 这个牌子的衣服质量很好，但价格偏高。
exampleTraditional: 這個牌子的衣服質量很好，但價格偏高。
examplePinyin: Zhège páizi de yīfu zhìliàng hěn hǎo, dàn jiàgé piān gāo.
exampleEnglish: The clothes of this brand are very good quality, but the price is a bit high.

english: to cultivate; to train; to foster
exampleSimplified: 学校注重培养学生的创新能力。
exampleTraditional: 學校注重培養學生的創新能力。
examplePinyin: Xuéxiào zhùzhòng péiyǎng xuésheng de chuàngxīn nénglì.
exampleEnglish: The school focuses on cultivating students' innovative ability.
